title: Hadoop MapReduce Command-Line Interface
description: The CLI.java file in the tools directory of Hadoop MapReduce serves as the command-line interface for managing MapReduce jobs. It processes command-line arguments to perform various actions such as job submission, status checks, priority setting, job history viewing, task management, and log file access. The core logic revolves around the `run` method, which interprets the command and executes the corresponding action. It interacts with numerous Hadoop MapReduce classes to accomplish these tasks, demonstrating a comprehensive use of the MapReduce API. This directory exemplifies a command-line utility pattern, providing a direct interface for users to interact with the MapReduce system.

TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Command-Line Interface

DESCRIPTION:
The CLI.java file in the tools directory of Hadoop MapReduce serves as the command-line interface for managing MapReduce jobs. It processes command-line arguments to perform various actions such as job submission, status checks, priority setting, job history viewing, task management, and log file access. The core logic revolves around the `run` method, which interprets the command and executes the corresponding action. It interacts with numerous Hadoop MapReduce classes to accomplish these tasks, demonstrating a comprehensive use of the MapReduce API. This directory exemplifies a command-line utility pattern, providing a direct interface for users to interact with the MapReduce system.
